channel.title: 主页 on
channel.description: Recent content in 主页 on

item.title: The_book_I_am_reading
item.description:
《the kaggle book》

<!-- 左侧：书籍封面 -->
<div style="flex-shrink: 0;">
  <img 
    src="images/the_kaggle_book.png" 
    alt="《The Kaggle Book》封面"
    style="width: 140px; height: 180px; object-fit: cover; border-radius: 10px; box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);"
  >
</div>
<div style="flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; line-height: 1.7;">
  <h3 style="margin: 0 0 8px 0; font-size: 1.4rem; color: #2d3748; font-weight: 600;">
    📘 《The Kaggle Book》
  </h3>
  <p style="margin: 0 0 12px 0; font-size: 1.05rem; color: #4a5568;">
    <strong>作者：</strong>Vera Khachatryan, Eryk Lewinson
  </p>

  <!-- 阅读进度条 -->
  <div style="margin: 10px 0;">
    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-size: 0.9rem; color: #718096; margin-bottom: 6px;">
      <span>阅读进度</span>
      <span>35%</span>
    </div>
    <div style="height: 8px; background: #e2e8f0; border-radius: 4px; overflow: hidden;">
      <div style="height: 100%; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #48bb78, #38a169); width: 35%;"></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- 当前阅读章节 -->
  <p style="margin: 8px 0 0; font-size: 1rem; color: #2b6cb0;">
    <strong>当前阅读：</strong>Chapter 5: Competition Tasks and Metrics
  </p>
</div>
📚 点击展开查看全书目录
Part I: Introduction to Competitions
1. Introducing Kaggle and Other Data Science Competitions
2. Organizing Data with Datasets
3. Working and Learning with Kaggle Notebooks
4. Leveraging Discussion Forums
5. Competition Tasks and Metrics ← 当前

  <strong>Part II: Sharpening Your Skills for Competitions</strong><br>
  6. Designing Good Validation<br>
  7. Modeling for Tabular Competitions<br>
  8. Hyperparameter Optimization<br>
  9. Ensembling with Blending and Stacking Solutions<br>
  10. Modeling for Computer Vision<br>
  11. Modeling for NLP<br>
  12. Simulation and Optimization Competitions<br><br>

  <strong>Part III: Leveraging Competitions for Your Career</strong><br>
  13. Creating Your Portfolio of Projects and Ideas<br>
  14. Finding New Professional Opportunities
</div>
